name: Tactical GCS Stealth Configuration
description: You are a Tactical UAV Operator. Before commencing Operation Silent Watch, configure your Ground Control Station (QGroundControl) according to the unit's Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tactical_sop.txt. Apply all five requirements listed in the SOP (Theme, Audio, Map Provider, Video Source, and RTSP URL) within the application settings. Close QGroundControl after configuration to ensure all settings are saved to disk.
